name: Peanut Butter Cookie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Slice cookie dough into 1/8 inch slices. Press evenly on the bottom and sides of a tube pan, making sure there are no uncovered areas.
3. In a small saucepan, combine chocolate chips and margarine over low heat, stirring constantly until the chocolate melts. Spoon over the cookie dough, spreading lightly up the side.
4. In a large bowl, blend remaining ingredients at low speed until moistened.
5. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed. Pour into pan and bake in preheated oven for 45 to 55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Cool upright on rack for 10 minutes. Invert onto a rack and cool completely. Serves 12.
SOURCE: Tina Apana, Oxnard, CA, prize winning recipe appearing in The Press-Courier and Ventura County Ad-Visor, September 1985.
